title: Achieving better value when buying
body: "Overview  This page brings together tools and guidance from the Department for Education (DfE) to support schools and trusts to get better value for money in line with procurement regulations.   DfE services to support schools and trusts  Energy for schools helps state-funded schools and trusts switch to the same energy contract used by DfE. It supports schools to:   secure best value reduce risk simplify the process of buying energy   Risk protection arrangement (RPA) is DfE’s alternative to commercial insurance that gives comprehensive risk protection, including cyber cover.  RPA membership brings many benefits that can help protect your school and staff, including:   financial protection peace of mind access to support   Get help buying for schools offers free support to help schools and trusts achieve the best value when purchasing goods and services.  We have already helped over 5,000 schools and trusts to:   get good value for money save time buy compliantly   Stay up to date  To learn about buying for schools and trusts, you can:   follow Buying for schools on LinkedIn for regular updates about how we’re supporting schools and trusts to make the most of non-staff spend read our Buying for schools blog to learn about what we’re working on now and what we’ll be doing next   Useful links  Get help buying for schools  DfE Energy for schools  "

taxons.title: Local authority schools financial reporting and assurance
